INVOKE.COMMENT: Extract Previous Run/reference file and create document
Get Latest User details from DataBase

LOOP.NAME: Parent
LOOP.COMMENT: Compare Reference Data with DB Data
Loop over Origincal Data of reference file

SEQUENCE.NAME: %userDetails/results/DN% == %originalData/recordWithNoID/UserId%
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: DB User ID mathes with reference file user name

MAP.COMMENT: Mark as User ID already exist

EXIT.COMMENT: Exit to proceed further to capture details

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Capture new user details by updating the flag

MAP.COMMENT: Mark as User ID not exist

BRANCH.COMMENT: Check the flag for New or Old user accounts

MAP.COMMENT: Mark User Type as OLD user
Mark User Type as NEW user
If Email ID is null mark the CHG_Ticket as Blank

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: If email Id is not null or present

INVOKE.COMMENT: Create String from the last document for next run reference

MAP.COMMENT: Get Current Date to Map in the Subject Line

BRANCH.COMMENT: Prefare Excel File and Send Email

INVOKE.COMMENT: Generate UserList as an excel sheet for attachment

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: End of File and send email

Values.value:
Dear Reader,
Please find the attached list of user details extracted from %Environment% environment for your reference.
Thanks and Regards, OneHubWMSupportTeam

INVOKE.COMMENT: Overwrite the Existig Reference File with New DB Details for Future Comparison
Capture Last Error from TRY Block

Values.value: %Environment% Environment User List Generation Job Failed

Dear Reader,
Execution of UserList Preparation job ended with an error %lastError/error% for the Service: "%lastError/service% " with ErrorType:%lastError/errorType%.
Kindly take appropriate action to regenerate the report.
Thanks and Regards, OneHubWMSupportTeam
